name: budget
description: Parent budget agent — manages budget thresholds, alerts, and delegates LLM cost tracking to llm-budget sub-agent and personal finance to personal-budget sub-agent.

skills.name: set-budget
skills.description: Sets a budget threshold and returns alert configuration

parameters.alertThreshold: number — percentage of limit that triggers alert

skills.name: get-status
skills.description: Returns overall budget status across all sub-agents (LLM + personal)

subAgents.name: llm-budget
subAgents.description: LLM cost tracking — estimates, tracks usage, optimizes spend, forecasts costs

subAgents.name: personal-budget
subAgents.description: Personal finance tracking — expense logging, savings goals, monthly reports, spending categories
